strengths: Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript, Node.js, AI-agent infrastructure, and MCP frameworks — precise overlap with the primary stack and AI agent requirement
Over 10 years of consistent fullstack delivery across diverse stacks (Node.js, React, cloud, Kubernetes, MongoDB, SQL) demonstrating genuine engineering breadth
Strong engineering craft signals: TDD advocacy, trunk-based development, code review culture, CI/CD setup, and community teaching across multiple roles
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume entirely; it is listed as a primary framework for the role
Kotlin/Java exposure is superficial (robotic arms at Altom, brief mention in skills) — insufficient for the secondary backend services requirement
React experience exists but Ember.js dominates the frontend history, suggesting React depth may be limited relative to the role's expectations

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
TypeScript/Node.js fullstack depth with cloud and containerization

response.justification: Bogdan is a well-matched candidate for the core of this role: his current position directly covers TypeScript, Node.js, AI-agent tooling, and developer infrastructure, which are the hardest requirements to find combined. His long career shows consistent fullstack delivery and strong engineering discipline. The main gaps are Nest.js (the primary backend framework) and meaningful Kotlin/Java experience, both of which are listed requirements; whether these are hard blockers depends on how quickly the team expects ramp-up versus how much weight they place on those specific technologies.
